title: OpenPLC Runtime 3.0 — webserver unauthenticated remote code execution via crafted ladder upload
remediation: Upgrade to OpenPLC Runtime 3.1+; restrict :8080 to MGMT subnet 192.168.40.0/24 (the in-container OT iptables rule in vm-ot/entrypoint_ot.sh accepts :8080 only from 192.168.40.0/24; host IT<->OT cut enforced by infra/docker-fw.sh).

title: Cyclone DDS 0.10.x — discovery message parser denial-of-service
remediation: Pin >=0.10.6 in ROS Humble; bias discovery to loopback (already done via vm-ot/sros2/cyclonedds.xml).

title: pymodbus < 3.7.2 — server crash on malformed TCP framing
remediation: Pin pymodbus>=3.7.2 (the lab pins 3.7.4 in vm-ai/requirements.txt and the vm-ot/vm-sec Dockerfiles).

title: Rockwell Micro800 firmware <= 15 — unauthenticated controller stop via crafted EIP packet
remediation: Upgrade firmware to >= 16.0; segment EtherNet/IP (tcp/44818) to OT subnet only (already enforced).

title: Linux kernel — XKCP SHA-3 reference implementation buffer overflow
remediation: apt upgrade linux-image-generic to >= 5.15.0-91; covered by unattended-upgrades policy.

title: Apache Guacamole 1.5.x — open redirect via crafted ${ jexl } expressions
remediation: Upgrade to Guacamole 1.5.5+ (already pinned in docker-compose.yml).
